summary.zh: 从接近最终尺寸的位置放大元素，并可切换为带轻微过冲的 Pop in。
summary.en: Scale from near the final size, with an optional slight overshoot for Pop in.

definition.zh: 元素出现时从较小尺寸放大到完整尺寸，通常与淡入搭配。
definition.en: An appearing element expands from a reduced scale to its final dimensions, commonly while opacity rises.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素相对最终尺寸的起始比例。
description.en: Controls the starting size relative to the final state.

description.zh: 开启后在落点前轻微超过最终尺寸。
description.en: Briefly exceeds the final size before settling.

description.zh: 控制动效开始前的等待时间。
description.en: Controls the wait before motion begins.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 让浮层、徽标或轻量状态从接近最终尺寸的位置建立视觉存在。
purpose.en: Establish overlays, badges, or compact states from a size close to their final form.

frequency.zh: 适合中频出现；频繁控件反馈将起始比例保持在 96% 以上。
frequency.en: Suitable for medium-frequency appearances; keep frequent control feedback above a 96% start scale.

trigger.zh: 由浮层打开、状态确认或小型对象挂载触发，缩放原点贴近触发来源。
trigger.en: Trigger on overlay opening, state confirmation, or compact object mounting, with origin near the trigger.

enterExit.zh: 进入从 88–96% 放大并淡入；离开轻微缩小并淡出，避免缩到零。
enterExit.en: Enter from 88–96% with a fade; exit with a slight shrink and fade, keeping scale above zero.

interruptibility.zh: 再次触发时使用当前比例为起点，保证连续缩放。
interruptibility.en: Use the current scale as the next starting point when retriggered.

gestureRules.zh: 该模式由状态触发；需要按压反馈时采用独立的 Press / Tap feedback。
gestureRules.en: This pattern is state-triggered; use Press / Tap feedback for direct press response.

reducedMotion.zh: 固定在最终尺寸，通过 80–120ms 透明度变化表达出现。
reducedMotion.en: Hold the final size and communicate appearance through an 80–120ms opacity change.

reviewNotes.zh: 核对 transform-origin 与触发来源。
reviewNotes.en: Verify that transform-origin matches the trigger source.

reviewNotes.zh: 控制文字缩放幅度，避免字形闪烁或模糊。
reviewNotes.en: Limit text scaling to avoid glyph shimmer or blur.
